transcript: Hello everybody. My name is Nass Diba, I'm co-founder and CEO of Worm. Worm is a prediction market protocol. What does it mean? Last year, the entire world saw how powerful prediction markets are in aggregating the wisdom of crowd and predicting the future. However, what we see with prediction markets today is just v0. It simply can't scale this way. There are two main players, centralized, they decide what markets they should be deployed and they spin up the markets. Again, today is day zero. We can soon see there are gonna be prediction markets on everything and we need scalable solutions. And Web3 came up with that scalable solution well before. It's protocol. And that's why we are building Worm permissionless protocol on Solana. How does it work? Basically, you can prompt the prediction market you would like to have. We have developed our very own LLM to create this prediction market with solid rules. Rules that can help you to resolve the market in a right way. Then you decide if you wanna deploy your own capital or inject capital, outsourcing it, crowdsourcing it, and then you just publish the prediction market and eventually we can help you to resolve the prediction market with our AI agent. However, today I'm here and very excited to announce leverage for prediction markets for the very first time. What does it mean exactly? Basically, we know there is a problem with prediction markets. There are simply the upside for them is very low. In this case, there is gonna be a boxing match in a few days between Joshua and Paul, and the market thinks Joshua is gonna win. There is gonna be 86% for him to win. The upside for you would be 14% if you bet on Joshua. However, you can go on Worm and you can open a 3x leverage. Which means the upside of 16% can turn to 48%, which is 50% upside for a match which is gonna happen in a few days. This is huge and we believe prediction markets are new financial primitives and like classic finance we need all the financial primitives for them. That's why we started with leverage. Another example here would be for Fed Chair that everyone is talking who President Trump would pick as the next Fed Chair. Currently the odds for the top pick, Kevin Warsh, is about 72%. So again, the upside here is about 23%. However, if you open up a 2x leverage on Worm, the upside for it would be almost 50%. And this is extremely important for prediction markets because when people they have high conviction on something, they shouldn't be limited on the amount of cash they have on hand. Yeah. That's what you can find on Worm. You can create a market and you can use leverage for prediction markets on Worm. This is a QR code for the upcoming match between Joshua and Paul. You can go on Worm, open up a 3x leverage and enjoy winning big. Thanks for your attention.

### MON, the Native Token of Monad, Goes Multichain with Wormhole NTT
Nov 24, 2025
·2min read
![https://images.ctfassets.net/n8aw1cra6v98/1z3ztdjMjOBvyuYylJfpUY/af2b41f975e378cd0c0148f3e2a14c8a/monadNTT.svg](https://images.ctfassets.net/n8aw1cra6v98/1z3ztdjMjOBvyuYylJfpUY/af2b41f975e378cd0c0148f3e2a14c8a/monadNTT.svg?w=1080&q=75)
MON, Monad's native asset, is now multichain on Solana powered by Wormhole NTT. This integration ensures MON's core functionalities remain fully operational while accessing Solana's optimized infrastructure and growing ecosystem.
##### What is Monad?
Monad is a Layer 1 blockchain that delivers full EVM compatibility with breakthrough performance, achieving 10,000 transactions per second, 800ms finality, and near-zero gas fees. Unlike Layer 2 solutions that build on existing infrastructure, Monad is rebuilt from the ground up with optimistic parallel execution, custom consensus mechanisms, and hardware-efficient design.
The platform addresses the fundamental trilemma of scalability, security, and decentralization while maintaining 100% EVM compatibility. This architecture combines the speed and efficiency needed for high-performance applications with the transparency and composability of decentralized protocols.
##### What is NTT?
Wormhole's NTT (Native Token Transfers) is an open and composable token standard for seamlessly transferring native tokens across blockchains while preserving their intrinsic properties. NTT is already powering natively multichain tokens for leading projects such as Sky, Lido, WalletConnect, RedStone, and Wormhole's W token, demonstrating its industry-wide impact and reliability. With MON, another leading asset joins the ranks of NTT adopters.
##### Why NTT?
By leveraging Wormhole's NTT standard, MON can scale seamlessly beyond Monad to Solana while eliminating liquidity fragmentation. With NTT, tokens maintain full control over their behavior on each chain, including aspects such as customizability, metadata management, and ownership or upgradeability. This ensures compatibility with any token standard or governance system, offering unparalleled flexibility and adaptability.
The expansion to Solana opens new opportunities for MON holders to participate in Solana's ecosystem with near-instant transactions and significantly reduced costs while maintaining the performance characteristics that make Monad's infrastructure unique.
##### Take Your Token Multichain with NTT
NTT is already being used by some of crypto’s most systemically important assets, like[Lido’s wstETH](https://wormhole.com/blog/lido-wsteth-goes-multichain-with-ntt)and[Sky](https://wormhole.com/blog/sky-formerly-maker-expands-usds-to-solana-with-wormhole-ntt)’s (formerly Maker) USDS, to unify users and liquidity.
Check out the[Wormhole NTT Docs](https://wormhole.com/docs/learn/messaging/native-token-transfers/overview/), or[get in touch](https://wormhole.com/contact)to go multichain and grow your token’s reach with an open and flexible standard trusted by the industry’s leading crypto assets.
##### Learn More
Learn more about NTT in a[15-minute workshop](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WnCMDXl0Fnc)given by Wormhole Foundation Product Lead, Nikhil Suri.
##### About Wormhole
Wormhole is the leading interoperability platform powering multichain applications and bridges at scale. Wormhole provides developers access to liquidity and users on over 40 leading blockchain networks, enabling use cases that span DeFi, governance, and more. The wider Wormhole network is trusted and used by teams like BlackRock and Uniswap Labs. To da

# Wormhole Labs unveils 'Sunrise' gateway to bring MON and other assets to Solana

By [Zack Abrams](https://www.theblock.co/author/zack-abrams)

[Crypto Ecosystems](https://www.theblock.co/category/crypto-ecosystems)
• November 23, 2025, 10:01AM EST

UPDATED: November 23, 2025, 10:09AM EST

Share

Partner offers

The Block may may earn a commission if you use our partner offers, at no extra cost to you.

Start trading cryptoGet a crypto rewards cardGet a crypto loan

#### Quick Take

- Wormhole Labs has launched Sunrise, a liquidity gateway designed to be the “canonical route” for bringing external assets to Solana.
- The platform is launching with immediate support for MON, the native token of the anticipated Monad blockchain, which will go live tomorrow.
- The initiative relies on Wormhole’s Native Token Transfers (NTT) framework to unify liquidity across Solana DEXs like Jupiter and block explorer Orb.

Wormhole Labs, the firm behind the Wormhole cross-chain protocol, today announced the public launch of Sunrise, a new liquidity gateway focused exclusively on the Solana ecosystem.

The product is pitched as a "canonical route" for external assets to enter Solana with day-one liquidity, giving users a single interface to move tokens from their origin chain onto Solana and immediately tap the network’s DeFi venues, according to materials shared with The Block.

According to the announcement, [Sunrise](http://sunrisebridge.xyz) aims to solve the "fragmented" liquidity issues often associated with bridging new tokens, ensuring that new onchain assets are tradable across Solana venues including decentralized exchange Jupiter and supported on Helius-incubated block explorer Orb from day one. Sunrise will launch with day-one support for Monad's [high-profile MON token](https://www.theblock.co/post/380040/monad-token-sale-defies-fizzle-fears-will-end-oversubscribed-on-coinbase), scheduled to begin trading tomorrow, as its first major test case.

"Solana’s vision for internet capital markets means being the platform on which users can engage with any asset, including crypto assets that aren’t originated on Solana," said Kuleen Nimkar, growth lead at the Solana Foundation. "Products like Sunrise are a critical part of enabling this future by giving non-native new assets a seamless, high-liquidity path into the network from day one."

The move comes as interoperability protocols race to capture flows between high-throughput chains.

tags.impact_reason: Worm's leverage for prediction markets on Solana is a novel feature and utilizes AI, but the overall impact remains to be seen.

editorial.headline: Worm Debuts On-Chain Leverage for Prediction Markets on Solana
editorial.standfirst: The new protocol tackles capital inefficiency by introducing leverage to prediction markets, transforming low-yield high-conviction bets into deep liquidity opportunities.
key_takeaways: First-ever on-chain leverage (up to 3x) for prediction markets to boost capital efficiency.
Permissionless market creation via custom LLMs and AI agent resolution.
Live markets include Fed Chair nominees and the Joshua vs. Paul boxing match.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
If 2024 was the breakout year for prediction markets, 2025 is about making them financially viable for serious capital. At Solana Breakpoint, **Worm** CEO Nass Diba unveiled a protocol designed to solve the two existential bottlenecks facing sector leaders like Polymarket: scalability and capital efficiency. While current platforms rely on centralized teams to manually spin up markets—what Diba calls "v0"—Worm utilizes a custom **LLM (Large Language Model)** to allow users to prompt and deploy permissionless markets instantly, with AI agents handling the resolution.

However, the true "alpha" for institutional participants is the introduction of **leverage**. In traditional prediction markets, high-conviction events often suffer from liquidity droughts because the upside is mathematically capped. Diba illustrated this with the odds for **Kevin Warsh** as the next Fed Chair. At 72% probability, a standard bet offers a mere ~28% upside—often too low to justify the lock-up of capital for sophisticated traders. By applying 2x leverage on Worm, that same trade yields nearly 50% upside, aligning the risk-reward profile with the hurdle rates of active fund managers.

This shift transforms prediction markets from novelty betting venues into robust financial primitives. By enabling up to **3x leverage** on events like the upcoming **Joshua vs. Paul** match, Worm allows traders to express high-conviction views without being limited by cash-on-hand constraints. This capital efficiency is critical for deepening liquidity; it incentivizes market makers to step in on "sure things" that would otherwise be dead capital. Worm is positioning itself not just as a betting platform, but as the infrastructure layer that brings derivatives-grade mechanics to the wisdom of the crowd.
